title: Melons Sugar Cane+
description: This mod expands on the boring parts of sugar cane since its a major part of farming and yet barely dose anything.
body:
Sugar cane plus is a mod that expands on the borning parts of sugar cane by adding a few new things to spice it up a little.

This mod expands sugar cane by giving it new food and drink options as well as some villager trades and new blocks for your decorations!
